messages.text:
# Project Ollie Overview

**Project Ollie** is an AI-driven, active task-suggesting engine developed by the XI Labs team under the broader **Workspace Cowork** initiative. The project's primary strategic focus is facilitating "One AI to many team members" collaboration, shifting from passive assistance to active cowork coordination [📄 XI Collab Cowork Daily Standup](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1KqfxnMVwcuZ7kpQJrSc_8UPrJfR7l0ZYpXMhVMpYBWQ).

---

## Key Features & Capabilities

Ollie is designed to streamline team coordination and task management through several key automated features:

*   **Context-Aware Triggers:** Ollie actively scans chat history and document comments in real-time to identify and suggest action items.
*   **Drafting Capabilities:** Rather than waiting for manual inputs, Ollie automatically detects planning gaps and drafts "new coworker plan edits" for team approval.
*   **Automated DRI (Directly Responsible Individual) Mapping:** Following established workspace expertise matrices, the engine automatically assigns suggested tasks to the most relevant team members.

---

## UI/UX Integration

To keep the collaborative workspace workspace clean and focused, the interface relies on a simplified layout [📄 XI Collab Cowork Daily Standup](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1KqfxnMVwcuZ7kpQJrSc_8UPrJfR7l0ZYpXMhVMpYBWQ):

*   **Interactive Cards:** Ollie’s task suggestions appear in the chat stream as subdued interactive cards, allowing team members to quickly "Accept" or "Edit" them.
*   **Table-First Representations:** Instead of complex, heavy elements like live calendar views, scheduling and updates are kept static and clean using table-first or text-based formats.
*   **Shared Visibility:** The chat canvas is optimized so that Ollie’s suggestions and status updates are pinned and visible to all workspace collaborators.

---

## Project Status & Development Milestones

*   **May 2026:** The team focused on backend logic and accuracy. Key tasks included defining the "Edits" logic for plan suggestions (assigned to Ian Mendiola) and implementing quality "hill-climbing" to improve task suggestion accuracy (assigned to Dylan Westerhold) [📄 XI Collab Cowork Daily Standup](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1KqfxnMVwcuZ7kpQJrSc_8UPrJfR7l0ZYpXMhVMpYBWQ). Performance was evaluated using joint evaluation sets established for the Remy x WS handoff.
*   **June 2026:** The project moved quickly into active prototyping and user research. The team launched a 3-day design exploration and prototyping sprint, conducted dozens of User Experience Research (UXR) interviews with target users, and began making steady progress toward a production-ready version [📄 Notes - XI Labs Team Weekly](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1tiL5I1K0qfl9-l_jpFode8PIuLj1bekYs_i6EYyp_c4).
how is project ollie similar to new drive?

Based on the [📄 Notes - XI Labs Team Weekly](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1tiL5I1K0qfl9-l_jpFode8PIuLj1bekYs_i6EYyp_c4), **Project Ollie** (referred to as **Project Friday** in earlier weekly notes) and the **"Upgraded Folders in Drive"** initiatives share several key similarities in their collaborative goals, interface design, and development focus:

### 1. Unified Collaborative Gateways
* **Project Ollie (Project Friday):** This project is designed as a brand-new Workspace surface acting as the "front door for collaborative work." 
* **Upgraded Folders in Drive:** This initiative aims to modernize the file-sharing experience, focusing on how users find, view, and organize collaborative files within Drive. 

### 2. AI Integration and Artifact Creation
* The **Drive upgrades** focus heavily on enabling users to **create AI artifacts** directly inside Drive.
* **Project Ollie** is undergoing design explorations and rapid prototyping to serve as a hub for collaborative workspaces, which aligns with modern Workspace AI creation tools.

### 3. Shared Prototyping and Research Cycles
Both projects are running on parallel tracks under the XI Labs team, utilizing intensive User Experience Research (UXR) to shape their final production versions:
* **Project Ollie** ran a 3-day design exploration sprint (June 16–18, 2026) with dozens of target user UXR chats to prepare its production build.
* The **Drive integrations** are being refined through concurrent diary studies and user panels to tackle how people naturally locate files and interact with AI features. 

Together, these projects represent a coordinated effort to make finding, organizing, and collaborating on documents more intuitive and AI-driven.

### Sources
* [📄 Notes - XI Labs Team Weekly](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1tiL5I1K0qfl9-l_jpFode8PIuLj1bekYs_i6EYyp_c4)
